sentences.arabic: سَقَطَ الطِّفْلُ حَسَنٌ مِنَ الدَّرَّاجَةِ وَجُرِحَتْ رُكْبَتُهُ.
sentences.translation: Dječak Hasan je pao s bicikla i povrijedio koljeno.
sentences.translationEn: The child Hasan fell from the bicycle and hurt his knee.

sentences.translation: Majka je brzo prišla i oprala ranu vodom.
sentences.translationEn: His mother hurried over and washed the wound with water.

sentences.arabic: وَضَعَتْ عَلَيْهِ ضِمَادًا صَغِيرًا مِنَ الصَّيْدَلِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Stavila je na njega mali flaster iz apoteke.
sentences.translationEn: She put a small bandage from the pharmacy on it.

sentences.arabic: بَكَى حَسَنٌ قَلِيلًا ثُمَّ عَادَ يَلْعَبُ.
sentences.translation: Hasan je malo plakao, a zatim se vratio igrati.
sentences.translationEn: Hasan cried a little then went back to playing.
